'''Milmit''' was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] working for [[Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo/Legends|Gorga Desilijic Aarrpo]] after the death of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. While interrogating [[Onoh]] at [[Glass Mountain]], he inadvertently discovered the ''[[Spirit of Jabba]]''.

{{Char-stub}}
